title: Hybrid Deal — Tucson AZ | $30K Entry, 2.5% Rate + 0% Seller Carry
hook: Lock in a 2.5% mortgage rate that doesn't exist anywhere in today's market — then layer a 0% interest seller carryback on top. Two loans, both below market, for $30K out of pocket in one of Arizona's most underrated metros.
description: Hybrid deal in Tucson AZ. $30K entry, 2.5% existing mortgage + 0% seller carry. 3bd/2.5ba, 1,713 sqft, est. $1,950/mo rent. COE May 2026.
